title: Odd user restrictions
excerpt: One of my team members can assign himself to tasks in one board but no in another board? As far as I can see the two boards have the same board permission settings. What am I missing?

posts.author: ollatpe (Ole Bo Larsen)
posts.cookedHtml: One of my team members can assign himself to tasks in one board but no in another board? As far as I can see the two boards have the same board permission settings. What am I missing?
